name: 3 Old Men Labyrinth
description: 3 Old Men is an installation of an octagonal, multicursal labyrinth. Burners are invited to enter the labyrinth for meditation throughout the burn. During the ritual offered at SOLAR NOON, SUNSET, and an hour AFTER SUNSET, at three of the four exits an officiant (Old Man) offers an experience.

name: Alien Goddess Garden
description: The Alien Goddess Garden is a beautiful display of imagination come to life through the creation of alien goddess figures using mostly repurposed materials paired with some good vibes decor. Stroll into the garden and help Blue name the aliens in her goddess tribe or hang out on our outdoor bed or take  a nap in the teepee. A relaxing place of intrigue by day and a glowing experience by night,our goddesses are bound to capture your attention if only long enough for you to suggest a name for each one of them.

name: Be the Hanged Man
description: The Hanged Man is the twelfth Major Arcana card in the tarot deckl. He’s being punished and he didn’t do it, or at least it wasn’t entirely his fault. But look at him! He’s got it figured out! He’s absolutely calm. Is that a hint of bliss in his face, a smidgen of enlightenment? If you’ve been there, come pose as the Hanged Man. Just be sure that when you use your device to capture the image that it’s right side up. You definitely don’t want to carry around the Hanged Man reversed!

name: Be the Lovers
description: Come pose as the Lovers, the the sixth trump in the Major Arcana of the tarot deck. The Lovers stand in front of the tree of life and the tree of knowledge, with an angel above representing the Divine Super-Consciousness. There’s plenty enough room for you trouples to pose! Or stand in the middle in your solitary glory to show that you bridge this polarity and know how to love yourself. Or pose to one side – if you are certain you are prepared for whom the universe will undoubtedly materialize.

name: Be the Reason Someone Smiles Today
description: Live and interactive art as well as workshops

name: Before “Eye” Die
description: To provide a platform for individuals to express their deepest aspirations.To create a communal space that fosters reflection, connection, and shared experiences. To promote dialogue and understanding within the community about life's meaning and purpose. To bring intention to manifesting our dreams. Participants will be provided with chalk in various colors to write their responses directly onto the board. The installation will be designed to encourage ongoing engagement, with space for new contributions as old ones are erased, symbolizing the ever-evolving nature of our dreams and aspirations. This will be set at a height that will be accessible to all, including the youngest burners and those in wheelchairs.

name: BubblEYE Courture
description: BubblEYE Courture:\r\nEnter the field of EYEflags, Bubbles and CoMOONity (stop in at The Tilted Hanger if you are not suitably attired- we can fix that!)

name: Coffee Bar!
description: Coffee Bar has been serving up snark and coffee for 2 years at TTM (and over ten years overall!) with 500 or more cups of coffee poured into THE CUP YOU TOTALLY REMEMBER TO BRING, to foggy-brained burners, night and day! We want to enhace the space and give people a place to mingle and play Trash or Treasure rather than taking our coffee and leaving. \r\nCoffee Bar has ALWAYS been an interactive space, with lots of art to look at and silly interactions with our Coffee Bar crew! Burners have a longer, lazier, louder, laugh filled time while at Coffee Bar!

name: Conglomerate of The All-Seeing Mailbox
description: These mailboxes see into your soul. Come play

name: Cosmic Planetarium
description: Want to get lost in the cosmic web of color? Have you ever found yourself drawn to hippie traps of swirling hues & tones? The Spectral Submerse Cosmic Planetarium will transport you to a place above and beyond this plane as you lounge under our photon-speckled dome; enveloped in an otherworldly cocoon of light & color. Put on some light refraction glasses, and enter hyperspace with your friends as the points of light stretch across your bubble universe, to a place where time becomes irrelevant, and all that exists is a spectral paradise.

name: Dead Sea Mud Body Painting contest
description: Muddy Buddies Presents: Dead Sea Mud Body Painting Competition! In an exploration of impermanence we will be hosting a body painting contest with dead sea mud! Join us for a zero consent talk and then become the art or the artist! Volunteers will judge the contestants. The winner gets bragging rights!

name: Dolls To Wall-Mart 2.0: The Baby Games Tour
description: Remember when Dolls To The Wall brought you the 2023 Baby Games? Exploding Diapers! Nap Time! And so much more... Well, now it's going on tour!! And so is the infamous Dolls To The Wall-Mart™ product line. Look out for our cart, the Diaper Dash, as it roams the streets of To The Moon with our new Baby Spinner 9000 that will determine your game, then earn Doll-ars to go shopping at the one and only Dolls To The Wall-Mart™!! Our products are precious and few, so peek-a-boo-gie on over when you see us and earn some Doll-ars today!

name: Every Burn Carry
description: Every Burn Carry (EBC)\nIt’s like EDC, except at a burn. Do you find yourself wishing you had more pockets? We’ve got slings, pouches, bags, belts, straps, keyrings, carabiners, sewing kits … We also have paint markers, pins, stickers, etc to personalize and/or de-commodify. Come by Camp Just People for on-body logistical solutions!

name: Eye of the Fairy
description: Tiny fairy village constructed of handmade fairy homes from rock and recycled finds.

name: Eye of You: Pistis Sophia, the Toroidal Syzygy, Interdimentional Ark
description: A meditative space energized with a crystal orgonite pyramidion capstone suspended within a hand braided copper pyramid frame. A Water vessel within contains a solution of effective probiotics known as EM-1. The collective prayer held in the crystal memory of the water will be used in a workshop lecture on regeneration, participants can take home a sample of this liquid which can be applied to soil, compost, and used for skin care.

name: Fabric Fun Guys
description: An exploration of trippy fabric fungi and other art quilts to stimulate your visual journey.

name: Human Charcuterie
description: Come and experience a taste of the finer things and enjoy a selection of tasty treats served on a variety of volunteer models.

name: Hypno-Frog
description: Have you ever wandered through a burn and heard a distant Croaking?\nIMMEDIACY! It’s the Hypno Frog’s time to hypnotize you!\nTrust us - Find the Frog, Touch the Frog, Trip in the Frog, Love the Frog.

name: Jupiter's Arcade
description: Jupiter's Arcade offers 200 of the most popular video games from 20+ years ago, all on a tiny Raspberry Pi. No cartridges to blow on, just an easy to navigate platform with game menus for Arcades, Nintendo, Super Nintendo, N64, Sony PlayStation, and Sega Genesis.

name: Kamp Khaos
description:
Hello there! Khaos here. My troupe of misfits and I have landed upon this realm to bring you a sight beyond sanity! Kamp Khaos! A fun filled family friendly place to drag your siblings, friends, or whomever and beat them in the face! We are a fully immersive combat-oriented gladiator event just itching for you to take the first step unto GLORY!! Just bring on down whomever pissed in your Wheaties and show them what's what. Because you my friends are the SHOW! This is a stress relief and frustration letting activity with adult bopper weapons and well-fortified armor. Feel free to let them have it as we have what it takes to go the distance! With the latest in Arms, Armor, and other bloodletting accessories at your fingertips visit wrath upon others! Enter a wacky realm in Kamp Khaos where you can take your best friend into the Arena and revel in the roar of the crowd while you abruptly introduce them to the mat. Then enjoy the thrills of doing so again, and again, and again. Or just kick them and others out of the ring and be crowned KING, or QUEEN, of the Arena! 
    Do you have what it takes to claw your way to the top? Can you, the wandering hipster, crush the competition and proclaim yourself Champion of the Tournament!?! Do you have it in you to take on grandma and her flying dentures of doom? Can you survive the humiliation of that walker grinding your bones to dust as you lie defeated and broken on the floor? WHO KNOWS?! Come let us find out in the realms of Kamp Khaos where everyone wins!
    We also encourage other theme camps or attendees to create “half-time” shows! In the past we have had medieval sword fighting and swashbuckling, Pokémon hunt/dance party, rabid raccoon trash wrestling, and so much more! Bring on over your zany ideas and let us provide you with a stage, spotlight, and a crowd to put that show on parade! ~limited spots are available~
  And to sweeten the deal just follow me and sign this little parchment here. No blood is necessary. Just a little ink and some permissions is all that is required for Elite Status!! This is so that we may not only have a blast of a time but after the event concludes we will post after action battle shots and full episodic videos of your courageous battles! A full spread of you and your defeated enemies piled at your feet in the Arena with full Celebrity Deathmatch style commentary! Be the star of the show as entire seasons are released per event. Who knows? You could be the next hot thing! Check out some of our work here below: https://youtu.be/ngp4twGe2Cc?si=KlwTp4RfKMVFNTth

Either way come on down and have you some fun! For this is the house of Khaos and the show has just begun!

name: Light Emitting Dimension (LED)
description: An interactive dance floor experience that makes you a part of the visual experience at Spectral Subverse.  Using your body through dance or touch will cause Light Emitting Dimension (LED) to generate hypnotic visuals that encapsulates the experience will draw you in- all based on your interaction with the art.

name: Lucy’s Psychiatric Help 5¢
description: This reproduction of Lucy’s Psychiatric Help 5¢ stand is instantly recognizable. Come on\ndown, Charlie Brown, and be gifted a nickel so that you can get a nickel’s worth of\npithy psychiatric advice from a six year old kid, or whoever else is sitting under the sign.

name: RED Flag
description: It is time the nature of the capture the flag game be called out for the anti burner game it is! Its selfish and antithetical. We have a way to fix that! Introducing the second iteration of the Red Flag game. You don't want this flag, this flag is Moop... If you find this flag you have to extricate your Red Flag to another camp...the flags might be gps tracked...You might get trolled for having a Red flag in your camp longer than anyone else...

name: Sensuous Structures: You Are Seen & The Astral Canvas
description:
Behold the latest marvel within the celestial menagerie of Sensuous Structures: You Are Seen - a mesmerizing and meaningful addition to our cosmic chicken wire sculpture family.

Giant glowing eyes, gazing into the night like celestial sentinels, You Are Seen transcends the tangible and ventures into the metaphysical. Illuminated in a symphony of iridescence, these eyes respond to the subtlest of sounds, as if attuned to the heartbeat of each burner. Address them, and watch the colors shift in a cosmic dance, reflecting the profound connection between art and observer.

In the shadow of the night, these ethereal eyes communicate more than words ever could. They speak a language of acknowledgment, a silent assurance that within their gaze, everyone is seen, recognized, and accepted. Each glance is a nod to the individuality and significance of those who stand before them.

But that's not all – the pièce de résistance, our 14-foot by 9-foot illuminated backdrop, The Astral Canvas, stands tall behind our fire circle, weaving a celestial tapestry that transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary. Flames flicker against its iridescent surface, creating a sacred space where the earthly and the cosmic converge.

Prepare to be captivated by these celestial eyes, for in their luminescence, they echo the profound truth that every soul wandering the burn is not just a spectator but an integral part of the cosmic spectacle. You Are Seen transcends the ordinary, inviting all to revel in the radiant dance of recognition beneath the star-studded sky.

name: Soul Wash
description: A fantastic way to wash your soul!

name: Struggle Bus 2.0
description: A lot of you are familiar with the original Struggle Bus. It is an elevated mobile party deck/lounge equipped with a DJ table, sound, generator ,and other technological marvels. It is built on top of a  truck. Version 2.0 will now be equipped with LED WALLS featuring interactive/psychedelic visuals surrounding most of the lower part(the truck part). What more is there to say?

name: The Gantry of time
description: The Gantry of time  (5 ft wide x 11ft tall x8 ft long ) is a teetering wood burning metal fire caldron. This Naust (safe haven) crates a firey destination burning from sunset till late into the night. this will be an epic meeting point  allowing participants to feed wood into the mouths of the vessel - burning their intentions wishes and wants

name: The Gifting Tree - The Heart of the Gifting Tree
description: Gifting and sharing are an important component of the Burn culture and the principle of “gifting” encompasses aspects of many of the other principles as well. Whether it’s through the sharing of our food, music, conversation, artistic talents, something from our lives that we are ready to part with, or ourselves through Radical Participation and Radical Self Expression, a “gift” is something to be given or taken without expectation. It is an opportunity for both giver and receiver to gain pleasure from the exchange and the Immediacy of the moment. Come once... come often.\r\n\r\nWith this expansion to The Gifting Tree, come delve inside and discover The Heart of the Gifting Tree to learn more about what truly makes gifting special.

name: The Land of the Mushroom
description: The Land of the Mushroom

name: The Mystic Moonhenge
description: Come feel the mystic energies of The Mystic Moonhenge and its relaxing garden lounge of Moonflowers

name: The Unprinciples
description: Vote for your favorites! The Unprinciples are the things that happen despite how well you follow the Principles. They attest to the travails of the rest of the burn experience (and they make for the best stories, too). We also have the 10+1 Principles themselves posted, and discussions of both abound, especially after you’ve had a drink at Camp Just People’s bar!

name: The Zoltar Booth
description: You Be Zoltar--

name: Tree Star City
description: Tree Star City is a large scale interactive art project where astronauts can explore art amongst the trees and stars. Astronauts can take space walks along tentsile hammocks, swing into space in parachutes, and lounge among the lunar lights.
